description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs yarn for all jobs. Define a lint job (runs in the default test stage, excluded from tags) that executes yarn lint, yarn dist, and then runs git status --porcelain dist/*.js | if read; then echo 'generated files are out of date'; false; fi. Define a test:coverage:node:4 job (runs in the test stage, uses node:4 image, excluded from tags) that runs yarn test:coverage and yarn codecov -- -t $codecov_token. Define a test:coverage:node:6 job (uses node:6 image, same scripts, excluded from tags) and a test:node:8 job (uses the default node:8 image, runs yarn test:coverage and yarn codecov -t $codecov_token, excluded from tags). All jobs run in the default test stage.
